---
title: Gene set enrichment analysis for human-specific genes
date: 2023-09-14
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To perform gene set enrichment analysis for the pseudobulk DGE results from 2023-09-06 and generate Generic Enrichment Map (GEM) output files for downstream EnrichmentMap analysis in Cytoscape. Essentially the same as 2023-09-07 with additional output GEM file.


## Files and directories

### Code

Same as 2023-09-07 with additional code for generating the Generic Enrichment Map file at `<utilities software directory>/gprofiler2_helpers.R`.

### Output

The output can be found in `<species_dge results directory>/20230914`. Same files as 2023-09-07 except with an additional output `*.gem.txt` file. This is a Generic Enrichment Map file that can be used for EnrichmentMap analysis in Cytoscape.


## Results

No change from 2023-09-07.
